name: Farm Chores
short_description: Farm chores is a 3D FPV item search game, where you find yourself on a mysterious farm, surrounded by lush green fields and ancient trees. Your goal is to escape, but the path to freedom is not so simple. Your task is to collect keys, notes, and food to overcome all obstacles and break free.
detailed_description:
Farm chores is a 3D FPV item search game, where you find yourself on a mysterious farm, surrounded by lush green fields and ancient trees. Your goal is to escape, but the path to freedom is not so simple. Your task is to collect keys, notes, and food to overcome all obstacles and break free.

Game Features:
3D World: You are surrounded by a three-dimensional space where every corner may hide a clue.
Find the Keys...
Discover Notes
Food: Don't forget to eat!
Dangers: Be careful!
